name: Total Current Assets
formula_symbolic: Total Current Assets = Σ(Current Assets Accounts)

name: Total Non-Current Assets
formula_symbolic: Total Non-Current Assets = Σ(Non-Current Assets Accounts)

name: TOTAL ASSETS
formula_symbolic: TOTAL ASSETS = Total Current Assets + Total Non-Current Assets

name: Total Current Liabilities
formula_symbolic: Total Current Liabilities = Σ(Current Liabilities Accounts)

name: Total Non-Current Liabilities
formula_symbolic: Total Non-Current Liabilities = Σ(Non-Current Liabilities Accounts)

name: TOTAL LIABILITIES
formula_symbolic: TOTAL LIABILITIES = Total Current Liabilities + Total Non-Current Liabilities

name: Accounting Equation
formula_symbolic: TOTAL ASSETS = TOTAL LIABILITIES + TOTAL EQUITY
